sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, it is Supplementuy
sections.text:
hereby confirmed that there was expended from the general appropriation
revenues of the Republic, such moneys indicated in respect of the
services of the Republic specified in the third column of the
Schedule, being expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated
for the services of the Republic by the Appropriation Act, 2009. Act No. W
of 2009
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 1010 Lusaka Price K1,000 each
. �
